name: slc-plugins
description: Shared Claude Code skills for Shoreline backend services — knowledge-base upkeep, AWS CloudWatch log search, the local Flask dev loop, and a notes/daily-log workflow.

plugins.name: slc-backend-knowledge
plugins.description: Capture and maintain a backend service's docs/knowledge base and architectural decisions (ADRs), and check the KB for staleness against the source.

plugins.name: slc-aws-ops
plugins.description: AWS operational tooling for backend services — safe, read-only CloudWatch Logs search from the terminal.

plugins.name: slc-dev-loop
plugins.description: Inner dev loop for backend services — start and exercise the local Flask dev server, and read Bitbucket pull requests.

plugins.name: notes-workflow
plugins.description: Daily-log lifecycle plus a capture/recall memory workflow over a markdown notes vault.
